ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the child */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian */,
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary caregiver */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance details of the child */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_caregiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("caregiver_id") REFERENCES caregivers ("caregiver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent or guardian */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caregivers" (
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caregiver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the caregiver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the caregiver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the caregiver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the caregiver */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the caregiver works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caregiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caregivers_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diaper_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diaper change */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child whose diaper was changed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the diaper change */,
  "wet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the diaper was wet */,
  "solid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the diaper was solid */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the contents (e.g., None, green, brown) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of contents in ounces */,
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caregiver who changed the diaper */,
  "diaper_type" TEXT /* Type of diaper used (e.g., cloth, disposable) */,
  "skin_irritation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there was any skin irritation or rash */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made by the caregiver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diaper_changes_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diaper_changes_caregiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("caregiver_id") REFERENCES caregivers ("caregiver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the child in pounds */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the child in inches */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the child */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the child */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies the child has */,
  "medications" TEXT /* List of medications the child is taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "administration_schedule" TEXT /* Administration schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diaper_change_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diaper change the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or observation */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date and time the note was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diaper_change_notes_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES diaper_changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert rule */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to be taken when the alert is triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., once, hourly, daily) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the alert (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert rule that triggered the alert */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES alert_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Delivered, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_integration" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child associated with the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., wearable, Bluetooth) */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Connection status of the device (e.g., Connected, Disconnected) */,
  "sync_schedule" TEXT /* Data synchronization schedule for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_integration_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diaper_change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diaper change */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diaper_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diaper_change_logs_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES diaper_changes ("change_id")
)
